raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-report of an ongoing metacognitive or attentional practice",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a meaningful distinction exists between passively arising thoughts and actively endorsed thoughts",
    "this distinction can be cultivated through deliberate practice",
    "the practice has value within a non-physical or consciousness-oriented framework"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; presupposes separable processes of occurrence and endorsement without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the distinction is experientially real, cultivable, and its cultivation produces measurable reduction in identification or reactivity",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "no genuine volitional separation exists between occurrence and endorsement, or the practice fosters dissociation rather than clarity"
}
